blog_title: ₹40 vs ₹85 Plain T-Shirt Wholesale — Why Cheap Fabric Ruins Print Quality for B2B Buyers
caption:
Client wanted ₹40 tees. I sent ₹85 ones instead. 😬

He thought I was crazy — until his prints started peeling after 2 washes. Thin fabric, zero shape retention. I sent a free 200 GSM sample instead. He ordered 500 pieces at ₹85, zero returns, ₹145 profit per piece.

Cheap fabric kills repeat orders. Always sample first.

Save this if you're sourcing blanks for your next bulk order 👇
